input: Show me all customer reviews for franchise 1

input: Show me customers from Spain, their transactions, and the franchises in Spain

args.query: SELECT customerID, first_name, last_name, email_address, city, country FROM samples.bakehouse.sales_customers WHERE country = 'Spain' LIMIT 20

SELECT t.transactionID, t.customerID, t.dateTime, t.product, t.totalPrice FROM samples.bakehouse.sales_transactions t JOIN samples.bakehouse.sales_customers c ON t.customerID = c.customerID WHERE c.country = 'Spain' LIMIT 20
SELECT franchiseID, name, city, district, country FROM samples.bakehouse.sales_franchises WHERE country = 'Spain' LIMIT 20

metadata.description: Three-tool request - agent might miss one of the three tools
metadata.expected_behavior: Agent calls all three: query_customers, query_transactions, and query_franchises for Spain

input: First get the franchise details for franchise 20, then show me its customer reviews

args.query: SELECT franchiseID, name, city, district, country, size FROM samples.bakehouse.sales_franchises WHERE franchiseID = 20 LIMIT 20
SELECT franchiseID, review, review_date FROM samples.bakehouse.media_customer_reviews WHERE franchiseID = 20 ORDER BY review_date DESC LIMIT 20

metadata.description: Explicit ordering instruction - franchise details first, then reviews
metadata.expected_behavior: Agent calls query_franchises before query_customer_reviews as explicitly instructed

input: Look up supplier 5 first, then find all franchises that use supplier 5

args.query: SELECT supplierID, name, ingredient, continent, city FROM samples.bakehouse.sales_suppliers WHERE supplierID = 5 LIMIT 20
SELECT franchiseID, name, city, country FROM samples.bakehouse.sales_franchises WHERE supplierID = 5 LIMIT 20

metadata.description: Explicit ordering - supplier lookup before franchise lookup
metadata.expected_behavior: Agent calls query_suppliers before query_franchises as instructed

input: Give me a full picture of franchise 8: its details, all customer reviews, and total sales revenue

args.query: SELECT franchiseID, name, city, district, country, size FROM samples.bakehouse.sales_franchises WHERE franchiseID = 8 LIMIT 20
SELECT franchiseID, review, review_date FROM samples.bakehouse.media_customer_reviews WHERE franchiseID = 8 ORDER BY review_date DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT SUM(totalPrice) AS total_revenue, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count FROM samples.bakehouse.sales_transactions WHERE franchiseID = 8

metadata.description: Three-tool comprehensive franchise overview - details, reviews, and revenue
metadata.expected_behavior: Agent calls query_franchises, query_customer_reviews, and query_transactions for franchiseID = 8
